source_authority: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation
rejection_reason: MoSPI Statement 5.1 is machine-readable and supports exact category aggregation plus an explicit narcotics exclusion. MoSPI methodology defines PFCE as expenditure of households and NPISH combined and states that the two are not separately available. The table reports fiscal year 2021-22 rather than calendar year 2021. It is therefore not admissible to the strict S14/P31DC Armilar 2021 exact matrix.

concept: National accounts scope and demand-side methodology
rejection_reason: The methodology confirms aggregate household final consumption as a GDP component but no purpose-classified table.
HIES provides COICOP household-survey shares for 2018-19, not national-accounts S14/P31 values for 2021.
The methodology documents separate aggregate HFCE and NPISH compilation but is not a purpose-classified 2021 dataset.

concept: GDP expenditure and income approach report
rejection_reason: The official 2021 expenditure-GDP release reports household consumption only as an aggregate component.
The official PDF preserves the 2021 aggregate expenditure evidence but does not provide a machine-readable twelve-purpose table.

The portal is source-discovery evidence and not itself an exact dataset.
